title: The Central Universities Act, 2009
full_text: The Central Universities Act, 2009 केन्द्रीय विश्वणविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2009 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200925 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 2009-03-20 Act Year: 2009 Short Title: The Central Universities Act, 2009 Hindi Title: केन्द्रीय विश्वणविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2009 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate universities for teaching and research in the various States and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 15-01-2009 Last Updated: 08-05-2019 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Universities Act, 2009 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Universities. Section 3A. Special provision with respect to the union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir. Section 3B. Special provision with respect to State of Bihar. Section 3C. Establishment of Central University of Andhra Pradesh. Section 3D. Establishment of Central Tribal University of Andhra Pradesh. Section 3E. Establishment of Sindhu Central University. Section 3F. Establishment of Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya in Gujarat. Section 3G. Establishment of Sammakka Sarakka Central Tribal University. Section 4. Effect of establishment of Universities. Section 5. Objects of University. Section 6. Powers of University. Section 7. University open to all castes, creed, race or class. Section 8. Visitor of University. Section 9. Officers of University. Section 10. Chancellor. Section 11. Vice-Chancellor. Section 12. Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 13. Deans of Schools. Section 14. Registrar. Section 15. Finance Officer. Section 16. Controller of Examinations. Section 17. Librarian. Section 18. Other officers. Section 19. Authorities of University. Section 20. The Court. Section 21. Executive Council. Section 22. Academic Council. Section 23. Boards of Studies. Section 24. Finance Committee. Section 25. Other authorities of University. Section 26. Powers to make Statutes. Section 27. Statutes, how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Regulations. Section 30. Annual report. Section 31. Annual accounts. Section 32. Returns and information. Section 33. Conditions of service of employees, etc. Section 34. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 35. Right to appeal. Section 36. Provident and pension funds. Section 37. Disputes as to constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 38. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 39. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 40. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 41. Mode of proof of University record. Section 42. Power to remove difficulties. Section 43. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 44. Transitional provisions. Section 45. Amendment of Madhya Pradesh Act 22 of 1973. Section 46. Amendment of President’s Act 10 of 1973. Section 47. Repeal and savings. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE.
